text:
Ok, let's get this party started!

A couple weeks ago I said I was publishing the most important thing I ever wrote. I was wrong.

Documentation related to the Google Search algorithm leaked and I spent the weekend tearing it apart.


https://
ipullrank.com/google-algo-le
ak
…
In my mind I was like "wait...who's fit trash - oh wtf?!"

Remember when I said it could happen any minute? 

I'd like y'all to meet Glory Myra Grace King.

Just stumbled upon a pretty awesome resource if you use Google Sheets called Sheets for Marketers - 
http://
bit.ly/2Z2pFv7 

It features over 100 templates for everything from on-page SEO to reporting to scraping to project management.
Dust off your Bing Webmaster Tools logins. Bing's index powers ChatGPT Search.
